statement: Subtask copy & paste — A user can copy one or more Subtasks and paste them onto the same Task or another Task, duplicating the Subtask instances (definition reference, specs, and field values) without re-running Channel/ChannelComposition generation. This is distinct from REQ-SBC-DUP-001, which duplicates Phase/Action/Task shared builder cards; Subtasks are field-level instances inside a Task (see REQ-SBC-005), not shared builder cards, so card-level copy-paste does not cover them. Paste must go through normal validation and must not blindly overwrite existing subtasks without review.
